docs.tagline: Your Growth Partner, Powered by AI
docs.paymentTermsOneTime: 50% advance to begin, 50% balance on final delivery
docs.paymentTermsMonthly: Full monthly fee payable in advance each cycle
docs.paymentSchedule:
- 50% advance payment to commence work
- Remaining balance due upon project completion / monthly for retainers
- All amounts are exclusive of applicable GST
docs.invoiceTerms:
Payment is due within 10 days of invoice date.
Late payments attract 2% per month penalty.
Accepted: NEFT / IMPS / UPI / Cheque
docs.invoicePaymentInstructions: Please transfer the payment to our bank account or scan the UPI QR code.
